testcase.name: test_upload_document_creates_encrypted_file
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:76: in test_upload_document_creates_encrypted_file assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","estate_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["query","name"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["query","category"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_download_document_decrypts_aes256
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:134: in test_download_document_decrypts_aes256 assert upload_resp.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {upload_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","estate_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["query","name"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["query","category"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:164: in test_preview_document_decrypts_inline assert upload_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_document_removes_from_storage
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:198: in test_delete_document_removes_from_storage assert upload_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_download_creates_audit_entry
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:445: in test_download_creates_audit_entry doc_id = upload_resp.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'

testcase.name: test_cleanup_test_documents
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:34: in admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please wait before trying again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
